productive_behavior: The cumulative plan-repair fix converged in one round, preserved the exact finding in plan repair history, and advanced to execution with a passing independent plan audit and deterministic plan lint.

Python and R independently recovered the exact planted effect and the controller quarantined a failed figure assertion before accepting the corrected reconciliation, raster figure, and precision-repaired table.

The final report passed deterministic validation and separate Gemma report and multimodal display reviews, while the retained evaluator trace exposed an unsupported result-shape omission rather than mis-scoring the raw statistics silently.
release_blockers: The deployed evaluator did not recognize primary.ci_lower and primary.ci_upper even though the bound Python and R result artifacts contained every exact reference value.
The final limitations claimed that balanced sample size and symmetric distributions mitigated concern after acknowledging that normality was not formally tested.
The conclusion called the observed contrast robust without a separately executed robustness or sensitivity analysis, and Gemma's report review returned a bare pass.
implemented_repairs: The known-effect evaluator now accepts the exact bound primary.ci_lower and primary.ci_upper schema and has a regression fixture copied from the deployed language artifacts.
Deterministic prose validation rejects normality reassurance based on balance and rejects robust used as a modifier of an estimate, result, finding, analysis, or contrast.

The report contract distinguishes cross-language implementation concordance from scientific robustness and requires an un-reassured limitation when no appropriate diagnostic or sensitivity analysis was executed.
disposition: Rejected despite terminal supported and a rescored 18/18 mechanical result; manual scientific review remains part of the release gate and overrules both deterministic and Gemma passes when claim scope is unsupported.
